title: clomenocoma aurantia
intro: Clomenocoma aurantia is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Commelinaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Clomenocoma aurantia has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. Clomenocoma aurantia is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
